text: Being here, I am surrounded by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The clean, modern lines of the architecture and the glass-walled room suggest a space devoted to learning and innovation. When I enter and read the wall labeled "R+D" and the reflective digital display, I feel both inspired and a bit vulnerable. The words on screen speak of confusion and longing for understanding, echoing my own feelings in a place dedicated to exploring the unfamiliar. I am both an observer and a participant, searching for meaning amid talk of research, development, and connection between humans and machines. There is a quiet tension here—an invitation to discover, but also a reminder of the discomfort that often accompanies growth and change.
